name: MET-PREVENT metformin physical-performance frailty trial
summary: A double-blind randomized placebo-controlled trial testing 500 mg oral metformin three times daily for four months in older adults with probable sarcopenia and physical prefrailty or frailty.
population: Adults aged 65 years and older with slow 4-meter walk speed plus probable sarcopenia and physical prefrailty or frailty
